zh.lifeSummary: 當James Hedge於大約1500年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特時，他的父親Robert Hedge28歲，母親Johanna Joan Rainsford26歲。他於1522年與Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1554年4月5日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可海爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hedge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a hedge or enclosure, from Middle English hegge ‘hedge, fence’. In the early Middle Ages, hedges were not merely dividers between fields, but had an important defensive function when planted around a settlement or enclosure.
English: probably also a variant of   Hatch  , with voicing of the final consonant.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Hecke  .

variants.name: Hatch
meanings: English: habitational name from Hatch (Bedfordshire, Devon, Hampshire, Somerset, Wiltshire), Hacche in South Molton (Devon), or else a topographic name from residence near a hatch, a gate leading to a forest or sometimes a sluice-gate, from Middle English hacche ‘gate’ (Old English hæcce, Kentish Old English hec(c)). This name has been in Ireland since the 17th century, associated with County Meath and the nearby part of Louth.

variants.name: Hedges
meanings: English: variant of Hedge , from the plural or, with excrescent -s.

variants.name: Hedger
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name from Middle English heg(g)er ‘hedger, a maker or repairer of hedges’, or perhaps in some cases a topographic name for a ‘dweller by the hedge’; compare Hedge .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Hedge was born about 1500, in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Hedge, was 28 and his mother, Johanna Joan Rainsford, was 26. He married Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill in 1522. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 5 April 1554, in his hometown, and was buried in Hales, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Hedge est né environ 1500, à East Bergholt, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Hedge, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Johanna Joan Rainsford, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill en 1522. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 5 avril 1554, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Hales, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Hedge um 1500 in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Hedge 28 und seine Mutter Johanna Joan Rainsford 26. Er hat 1522 Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 5. April 1554 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hales, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill nel 1522. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 5 aprile 1554, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Hales, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: James Hedgeが約1500年にイギリスイギリススフォルクエアスト バーグホルトで生まれた時，父Robert Hedgeは28歳，母Johanna Joan Rainsfordは26歳であった。1522年にLady Elysabethe Susan Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1554年4月5日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクヘイレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Hedge(이)가 대략 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이스트 버고트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Hedge(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Joan Rainsford(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1522년 Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1554년 4월 5일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 헤일스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill em 1522. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Hedge родился около 1500 г. в местности эаст бирголт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Hedge было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Joan Rainsford, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill в 1522 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 5 апрель 1554 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности хэлесь, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
